title: Excise tax statistics - Canada.ca
content:
## Excise tax statistics
The excise tax statistics publication presents the amount of excise tax assessed for petroleum products (excluding the fuel charge), fuel-inefficient vehicles, and air conditioners designed for automobiles. The excise tax statistics are based on information that the Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) collected and processed from excise tax remitters within a specific fiscal year (April 1 st to March 31 st ).
Please refer to the Excise taxes and other levies technical information website for more information.
- 2023 Edition (2021-2022 fiscal year)
- 2022 Edition (2020-2021 fiscal year)
- 2021 Edition (2018-2019 and 2019-2020 fiscal years)
